lineup_dimensions.CONCENTRATION: Rolling 15-game mean Gini(slot_hits), shift(1), min 10 games

verdict_detail: Discovery showed signal but validation failed directional consistency.

data_quality_notes.root_cause: hitter_game_logs has 128K away-batter rows vs 76K home-batter rows — structural asymmetry
data_quality_notes.impact: Valid team-halves (14,234) are asymmetrically weighted toward away-team observations
data_quality_notes.interpretation: Discovery signal (max_residual=0.804) and validation failure (40% dir_consistency) should be viewed in light of this bias

validation_analysis.interpretation: Interaction effects in validation are not only absent but directionally opposite to discovery — strong evidence of no stable signal in these dimensions
possible_explanations: True null: lineup archetypes at this granularity have no persistent effect on run scoring
Structural bias: home-side coverage asymmetry in source data creates non-representative discovery sample
Label instability: 15-game rolling windows may not capture stable lineup identity at team level
Dimension choice: BB%, ISO, K%, BB% may be too noisy at game-log aggregation level
